author: doll-agent
content: Add ferray-stats/src/hypothesis.rs with: pearsonr (cov/(std·std) + t-distribution p), spearmanr (rank-based pearsonr with average ranks for ties), ttest_1samp (one-sample t-test + p), ttest_ind (Welch's two-sample t-test + p), ks_2samp (KS statistic via union-of-points + Kolmogorov asymptotic survival series). p-values backed by a compact regularised incomplete beta (Lentz CF) + Lanczos lnΓ implementation. chi2_contingency needs incomplete gamma; filed as #743. 15 new tests cover known closed-form values, perfect ±1 correlation, strong/weak signals, and degenerate cases (constant input, length mismatch, empty).
